Book Your Adventure

Your Island Adventure Itinerary

⏰ 9:00 AM - Pick Up

Start Your Journey

📍 Pick Up Port: Cordova Roro Port

🏖️ Landmark: Parola Restaurant

Environmental Fee: ₱10/person | Docking Fee: ₱100
🏝️ First Stop

Gilutongan Island Marine Sanctuary

Dive into pristine waters and discover vibrant marine life in one of Cebu's most protected sanctuaries.

Entrance Fee: ₱100/person
🍽️ Lunch Time

Nalusuan Island

Option 1: Bring your own food and enjoy the island facilities

Option 2: Enjoy our delicious buffet spread

Entry Only: ₱300/person | With Buffet: ₱870/person
🌴 Final Destination

Caohagan Island

Experience authentic island life and relax on pristine white sand beaches surrounded by turquoise waters.

Package Fee: ₱175/person (Environmental Fee + Island Access)
⏰ 2:30 PM - 3:30 PM

Return Journey

Head back with unforgettable memories and sun-kissed skin!

The Three Paradise Islands

🐠 Gilutongan Island

Home to one of Cebu's most vibrant marine sanctuaries. Snorkel among colorful fish and pristine coral reefs in crystal-clear waters.

₱100 per person

🍴 Nalusuan Island

Perfect lunch spot with stunning views. Choose to bring your own food or enjoy our delicious buffet while surrounded by paradise.

₱300 (entry) | ₱870 (with buffet)

🏖️ Caohagan Island

Experience authentic Filipino island culture on this peaceful sanctuary. White sand beaches and warm hospitality await you.

₱175 per person (package)

Water Sports & Activities 🌊

Make your island adventure even more exciting!

🍌 Banana Boat

₱2,500 / 15 minutes
Minimum 8 persons

🏍️ Jet Ski

₱3,500 / 30 minutes
Feel the thrill!

🪂 Parasailing

₱2,500 per person
15 minutes of aerial views

Delicious Island Feast 🍽️

Available Food Options

  • Korean Food
  • Ramen
  • BBQ Pork
  • Grilled Corn
  • Fresh Mangoes
  • Watermelon
  • Rice
  • Drinks & Water
💡 Note: You can purchase BBQ and food items depending on your group size. Perfect for a beach feast!
